Redesign homepage with Alibaba-style layout

- Replace hero with 3-panel layout: category sidebar, frequently searched + savings bonanza center, hot picks right panel
- Add trust/guarantee section (GlobexSky Guaranteed) after hero
- Replace products section with horizontally scrollable Top Deals cards (product-card-v2)
- Add Top Ranking section with category tabs and ranked product grid
- Replace suppliers section with Tailored Selections grid (daily picks)
- Add promotional banner (€10 off every €100) before livestream section
- Replace footer with enhanced 5-column Alibaba-style footer with app download row, payment badges, sister sites
- Add category dropdown button and search mode tabs to navbar
- Style search submit button in GlobexSky orange
- Append all new CSS to main.css (no existing styles removed)
- Add JS: initSearchTabs, initCatSidebar, initTopDealsScroll, initRankingTabs, initDealsCountdown
- All existing sections, nav controls, aria attributes, and door animation preserved

  - Category navigation bar (gs-category-nav)
  - Hero with sidebar + banner slider + sub-banners (gs-hero)

  - How it works steps (gs-steps)
  - Newsletter section (gs-newsletter)

  - Trust badges, flash sale with countdown timer
  - 10 frequently searched products + 5 top ranking products
  - 4 featured suppliers, how-it-works section
  - Newsletter signup, 5-column footer

  - All existing scripts preserved (door animation, cart, auth, AI widget)

commit.message:
v5.10.0 (#102)

* ## v5.10.0
- *Enhancement:* `TestSharedState` updated to enable request-based (isolated) state; with the corresponding `GetHttpRequestId()` method now made public.
- *Enhancement:* Added `ApiTesterBase.AddPreRunAction()`, `AddPostRunBeforeExpectationsAction()`, `AddPostRunAfterExpectationsAction()` and `AddPostRunAction()` to enable the addition of actions to be executed at different stages of the `Run`/`RunAsync` process for every underlying test. This will enable the addition of common pre/post processing logic without having to explicitly add to each test.
- *Enhancement:* `TEntryPoint` methods can now be specified as `static`.
- *Enhancement:* `ApiError` added implicit conversion from (`string?`, `string`) tuple to enable simplified usage; e.g. `AssertErrors(("field", "Bad Request"))` versus `AssertErrors(new ApiError("field", "Bad Request"))`.
- *Fixed:* Reset `MockHttpClientRequest` internal state when using any `With*` method to ensure correct behavior.

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Hosting/EntryPoint.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Abstractions/TesterBase.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>

* Fix: Replace ExecutePreRunActions with ExecutePostRunActions in HttpTesterBase finally block

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/Avanade/UnitTestEx/sessions/aaa8d366-8973-4d7e-9cf4-e99050cedaf0

Co-authored-by: chullybun <12836934+chullybun@users.noreply.github.com>

* Correct comment.

---------

Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: UnitTestEx
repository.description: UnitTestEx provides .NET testing extensions to the most popular testing frameworks (MSTest, NUnit and Xunit) specifically to improve the testing experience with ASP.NET controller, and Azure Function, execution including underlying HttpClientFactory mocking.

feat: add cursor-auto-hide VS Code extension

- Auto-hide mouse cursor after configurable inactivity delay (1-30s)
- 3-layer CSS defense: cursor:none, pointer-events:none, display:none
- Config JSON separation for reliable delay updates without Electron cache
- Exempt keyboard-triggered hover (space h) and quickFix overlays
- Fix corrupt installation warning via SQLite integrityService update + MutationObserver auto-dismiss
- Shell injection prevention via execFileSync
- Disposable accumulation fix via configRegistered flag
- README with feature overview, settings reference, and troubleshooting
- GitHub Actions CI + publish workflows

feat: create complete frontend UI for PropagatePro

- Auth context with login/register/logout and session management
- Landing page with feature highlights and CTAs
- Login and register pages with validation
- Dashboard layout with collapsible sidebar navigation
- Dashboard page with stat cards, health chart, and quick actions
- Inventory page with CRUD for mother plants
- Cuttings page with filters, status badges, and stage advancement

- Sales page with revenue tracking and monthly summaries
- Business page with profit analytics and CSV export
- Automation page with device control and schedule management

Add Prisma seed file with demo data for plant propagation tracking

- Create prisma/seed.ts with comprehensive demo data:
  - Demo user with hashed password
  - 3 mother plants (Monstera, Philodendron, Peperomia)
  - 9 rooting rules (water, soil, perlite per species)
  - 3 propagation batches
  - 8 cuttings across various stages
  - 4 tasks and 4 time logs
  - 1 sale record
  - 4 supplies
  - 1 smart device with light schedule
  - 2 notifications
- Add prisma.seed config to package.json
- Install tsx as dev dependency for seed execution
- Seed is idempotent (uses upsert and find-or-create patterns)

feat: add all API route handlers for PropagatePro

Create 26 API route files covering:
- Auth: register, login, logout, me
- Plants: CRUD with search/filter
- Cuttings: CRUD with status transitions
- Batches: CRUD with success rate stats
- Tasks: CRUD with date range filters
- Time logs: start/stop timer with duration calc
- Sales: create with profit calculation
- Supplies: CRUD
- Devices: CRUD + light on/off + water pump
- Automation: light and water schedules

commit.message:
Handle all 21 form questions: add new fields, fix option text, add scale support

- config.yaml: Set real form URL, add all 21 question definitions with exact
  form option text, add education/employment/risk_agreement/trust/happiness
  fields to matrix profiles, fix income/first_invest/risk/drop option text
- bot.py: Use data-value XPath for radio clicks, add _click_scale_radio for
  linear scale questions scoped by entry_id, add fill methods for all new
  questions, add XPath quote escaping
- matrix.py: Add generators for education, employment, risk_agreement,
  financial literacy quiz (3 Qs correlated with literacy_mean), social trust,
  financial trust, happiness, life satisfaction

commit.message:
feat: markdown rendering, thinking block, conversation reload fix

- ai-chat-sidebar: add ReactMarkdown + remark-gfm for assistant message rendering
- ai-chat-sidebar: collapsible ThinkingBlock component — shows orchestrator steps
  in real time while streaming, auto-collapses when response arrives
- ai-chat-sidebar: handle {type:'thinking'} SSE chunks — accumulate steps in message
- ai-chat-sidebar: fix handleSelectConversation — was checking Array.isArray(result)
  but action returns {success,messages} — now correctly checks result.success
- ai-chat-sidebar: messages now persist/restore correctly after page reload

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: proxy chat stream through Next.js, auto-restore last conversation

- Add /api/chat-stream route that proxies SSE to internal NemoClaw API
  (browser cannot reach http://terminia-api:3100 directly — Docker internal)
- getChatStreamConfig now returns /api/chat-stream (same-origin, always reachable)
- Auto-restore most recent conversation + messages when sidebar opens
- Only auto-load once per mount, then just refresh the list on subsequent opens

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: sync pnpm-lock.yaml with latest dependencies

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: chat conversations list bug, dynamic questions by user type

- Fix listConversationsAction result handling (was checking Array.isArray
  on {success, conversations} shape — now correctly reads result.conversations)
- Add accountType state, load from getChatStreamConfig on sidebar open
- Show company-specific questions for company accounts (BandoRadar, OSINT,
  controparti) and personal questions for personal accounts
- Pass accountType from getChatStreamConfig return type

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

npm ci was failing because package.json declares packageManager pnpm@9.
Switch to corepack enable + pnpm install --frozen-lockfile using pnpm-lock.yaml.

for persona fisica and registration uploads instead of relying on

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: pass NEMOCLAW_API_URL as build arg so rewrites resolve correctly

Next.js rewrites are evaluated at build time. Without the build arg,
NEMOCLAW_API_URL was undefined during docker build, falling back to
nemoclaw.pezserv.org (wrong host). Now passes the correct internal
URL http://terminia-api:3100 as a Docker build arg.

Also passes NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_* as build args since Next.js inlines
these at build time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Merge upgrade branch: SSR + TypeScript migration

- SSR with getServerSideProps on all public pages (/, /l/[id], /lc/[name], /a/[id], /search/[key])
- next-redux-wrapper with HYDRATE handler so Redux state is pre-populated server-side
- Product names, titles, meta data rendered in initial HTML for Googlebot/SEO
- localStorage polyfill for SSR safety
- Mock data fallbacks when Tradly API is unreachable

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Migrate to TypeScript + SSR with next-redux-wrapper

- Install next-redux-wrapper
- store/store.js → store.ts with makeStore/wrapper/AppStore/RootState/AppDispatch exports
- pages/_app.js → _app.tsx using wrapper.withRedux (removes manual Provider)
- Add setHomeData reducer to homeSlice
- Add setListingDetail reducer to listingSlice
- pages/index.js → index.tsx with getServerSideProps (/api/home, /api/banners)
- pages/l/[id].js → l/[id].tsx with getServerSideProps (/api/l/[id])
- pages/lc/[name].js → lc/[name].tsx with getServerSideProps (/api/lc/[name])
- pages/a/[id].jsx → a/[id].tsx with getServerSideProps (/api/a/[id])
- pages/search/[search_key].jsx → search/[search_key].tsx with getServerSideProps
- Rename 16 remaining pages to .tsx (with @ts-nocheck for safe migration)
- Rename all 12 store slices from .js to .ts (with @ts-nocheck)
- Add store/hooks.ts with useAppDispatch/useAppSelector typed hooks
- Add types/jsx-compat.d.ts to bridge React 18+ JSX namespace for react-markdown v7
- Add types/styles.d.ts for SCSS/CSS module declarations
- Add .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
- Fix duplicate JSX attributes in InviteFriend.jsx, StoreButton.jsx, WishListButton.jsx
- Update tsconfig target from ES5 to ES2017 (ES5 deprecated in TS 5.x)
- Build passes successfully

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
